data.name: Heartsworn Abyss
data.detailed_description:
Heartsworn Abyss is a hand-drawn visual novel with beautiful illustrations and voice acting by professional Japanese illustrators and voice actors! Nothing in Heartsworn Abyss is sourced from AI, and we intend to keep it that way moving forward!

Rei Tsukiyora is a jaded man who runs a pawnshop in Miyogawa’s seedy underworld. One evening, he comes across a despondent Akari Hashimoto fleeing from her captors. Unable to abandon a young girl to the dangerous streets, Rei begrudgingly takes her in, offering her a reprieve until she gets her bearings in order.

One thing leads to another, however, Akari’s stay becomes more… permanent then he had envisioned. For Akari, who has only led a high-flying life, and for Rei, a man who lives off the skin of his teeth, life together is… manageable (if not amusing).

While Akari may have renounced her past life as a heiress, fate won’t let them go that easily. Akari’s entrancing looks and eminent status catch the eyes of Ryuichi Satou. As the head of Miyogawa’s largest company, he spares no resources on seducing her. An irate Ryuichi even accosts the pair at Rei’s residence, though Akari flatly rejects him.

Humiliated, the scorned prodigy concocts a grand scheme that will lead to the hostile takeover of Akari’s company, and eventually, her heart. He swears to sully every fiber of her innocence. As for Rei… Ryuichi vows to bury him in an everlasting abyss.

Illustrators: kamiyan, Subaru Tsukiyono
Voice Actors: Shu Sagisawa, Yui Hibari
Script: amaryllis

Heartsworn Abyss is a voiced visual novel, an interactive medium that combines narration with beautiful anime illustrations, music, and voice acting. Gameplay majorly consists of reading with some interactive elements. Our visual novel runs at a beautiful 2560×1440 resolution and is compatible with Windows, Linux, macOS, and Steam Deck!

Our Early Access will have 3 voiced chapters (75k words) upon release, and we’re adding more each passing day! Come see what vanilla and NTR fans worldwide are raving about!

Heartsworn Abyss is an (avoidable) NTR game. Though the majority of our scenes are NTR-themed, it can be avoided with smart planning, with perhaps a happy ending for our main couple in the end. Maybe.

data.short_description: Heartsworn Abyss is a survival-thriller taking place in a modern dystopian world. Can Rei, a broken man whose life is on the mend, hope to oppose the sinister machinations of Saitou Corporation? Or will he and Akari be swallowed by Miyogawa’s darkness, to be strung along like broken puppets?
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 韓文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher.
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
